content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Clickup: Group Product Manager Anywhere in the World Product Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> United States of America </p> <p>At ClickUp, we’re not just building software. We’re architecting the future of work! In a world overwhelmed by work sprawl, we saw a better way. That’s why we created the first truly converged AI workspace, unifying tasks, docs, chat, calendar, and enterprise search, all supercharged by context-driven AI, empowering millions of teams to break free from silos, reclaim their time, and unlock new levels of productivity. At ClickUp, you’ll have the opportunity to learn, use, and pioneer AI in ways that shape not only our product, but the future of work itself. Join us and be part of a bold, innovative team that’s redefining what’s possible! </p><h3>About the Role</h3><p>As a Group Product Manager, you will lead a team of Product Managers to drive the vision, strategy, and execution for a portfolio of high-impact product areas within the core product. You will manage a team of 4-6 Product Managers at various levels. You can expect ~30% of your time dedicated to individual contributions within the core product, leading by example.</p><p><br class="ProseMirror-trailingBreak"></p><h3>Key Responsibilities</h3><ul><li><p>Lead and mentor a team of Product Managers across multiple squads.</p></li><li><p>Set product vision and strategy aligned with company goals.</p></li><li><p>Own the group roadmap, balancing quick wins with long-term initiatives.</p></li><li><p>Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, design, analytics, GTM teams, and EPD leadership.</p></li><li><p>Stay on top of metrics for all areas</p></li><li><p>Establish product rituals and processes to streamline operations across the organization.</p></li><li><p>Conduct market research and analyze user feedback.</p></li><li><p>Define and track key performance metrics.</p></li><li><p>Foster a culture of ownership and continuous improvement.</p></li><li><p>Build strong stakeholder relationships.</p></li><li><p>Present strategy and results to executives.</p></li><li><p>Contribute as an IC on a specific area of your team.</p></li><li><p>Hire and onboard Product Managers to the product organization.</p></li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><h3>Qualifications</h3><ul><li><p>10+ years in Product Management, with 5+ years managing a team of Product Managers.</p></li><li><p>Proven experience in building and scaling B2B SaaS products in high-growth environments.</p></li><li><p>Strong analytical and data-driven decision-making skills.</p></li><li><p>Excellent communication and stakeholder management abilities.</p></li><li><p>Demonstrated ownership of business metrics and results.</p></li><li><p>Comfortable with ambiguity, a fast pace, and high expectations.</p></li><li><p>Experience in startups and/or at scale.</p></li><li><p>High standards for product quality and user experience.</p></li><li><p>Passionate about AI</p></li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><h3>Nice to Have</h3><ul><li><p>Experience in leading AI-driven products</p></li><li><p>Background in developer platforms or productivity tools.</p></li><li><p>Familiarity with ClickUp’s product areas (e.g., Views, Tasks, Whiteboard, Mobile, Chrome extension).</p></li></ul><p>&nbsp;</p><p>#LI-Remote</p><p>#LI-MAV</p><p><br>Unsure if you meet all the qualifications of this job description but are deeply excited about the role? We hire based on ambition, grit, and a passion for improving the way people work. If you think ClickUp is the company for you, we encourage you to apply!</p><p>At ClickUp, we assess every candidate based on the potential impact they can have. We hire the best people for the job and support each person’s journey to build their boldest career.</p><p><br class="ProseMirror-trailingBreak"></p><p><strong>Equal Opportunity Employer </strong></p><p><em>ClickUp is an Equal Opportunity Employer, and qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, or national origin.</em></p><p></p><p><strong>Privacy Notice</strong></p><p><em>ClickUp collects and processes personal data in accordance with applicable data protection laws.</em></p><ul><li><p><em>If you are a European Job Applicant, see our </em><a href="https://clickup.com/terms/privacy"><em>privacy policy </em></a><em>for further details.</em></p></li><li><p><em>If you are a Philippine Job Applicant, see our </em><em> and our </em><a href="https://t333.s.clickup-attachments-stg.com/t333/d9a53ce2-6d2c-48cd-84b1-ed4e525f9613/Philippine%20Data%20Privacy%20Notice_2024.pdf?view=open"><em>Philippine Data Privacy Notice</em></a><em> for further details.</em></p><p></p></li></ul><p><strong>Visa Sponsorship</strong></p><p><em>Please note we are unable to sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment visa for roles outside of engineering and product at this time. Sponsorship for engineering and product roles is not guaranteed, but is instead based on the business needs for that specific role at that time. Please reach out to the recruiter with any questions.</em></p><p></p><p><strong>Fraud Alert</strong></p><p>ClickUp Talent Acquisition will only initiate contact via an <strong>@</strong><a href="http://clickup.com"><strong>clickup.com</strong></a> email or through our official careers portal on <a href="http://clickup.com">clickup.com</a>. We will never request fees, payments, or sensitive personal information. Please disregard any offers received outside these channels and report them to support@clickup.com.</p> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clickup-group-product-manager">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clickup-group-product-manager</a></p> Thu, 30 Apr 2026 17:39:04 +0000 Sat, 30 May 2026 17:39:04 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clickup-group-product-manager https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/clickup-group-product-manager Restream: Senior Product Designer Anywhere in the World Design Full-Time <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Remote (Europe) </p> <p>We believe everyone has a story worth sharing, and anyone can become an exceptional video creator with unlimited reach. We're on a mission to craft top-quality tools for video content creators.</p><p></p><p>We are looking for a talented individual who shares our passion for high-quality design. As a <strong>Seni
